text: Katie, a 7-foot-tall giraffe at the Dallas Zoo, gave birth to a 6-foot-tall calf in an hour-long live broadcast on Animal Planet. The birth was captured by 10 cameras and watched by thousands online. Katie held up well under the spotlight, despite being a bit of a diva among her herd of 12 giraffes.

text: Two connected shootings occurred in Washington on Thursday, one at the U.S. Census Bureau's headquarters and another in a busy restaurant area. The incidents began with a suspected domestic kidnapping. A guard was critically injured at the Census Bureau after approaching a vehicle in which two people were arguing. Following a police chase and shootout, an officer and the suspect were wounded. The kidnap victim was found in good condition.

Two shootings occurred in Washington, D.C., with authorities stating they were connected. The shootings started with a domestic kidnapping incident, and a guard at the U.S. Census Bureau was shot when approaching the suspect's vehicle. The suspect fled and a chase ensued, ending in a shootout and leaving an officer and the suspect injured. The police chief believes the same car and person were involved in the kidnapping. The victim was found and in good condition. The identities of those involved were not disclosed.
